title: Curse of Pandora
description: 72 unique artifact items with curses and special effects, and various ranged weapons
body:
Dependency: [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios), [L2 Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2library), [L2 Complements](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2-complements) (to utilize some materials and effects)

Suggest to play with: [L2 Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2weaponry), [L2 Archery](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2archery), [L2Hostility](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2hostility)

 

This mod is a curios/trinket focused mod that adds a lot of items to strengthen the player and improve game experience. Player can equip Pandora Necklace and Pandora Bracelet, which can hold 18/9 pandora charms. The charms will can be edited in the item, or when the holder items are equipped, in the pandora tab. This mod is inspired by the real-world jewelry brand [Pandora](https://us.pandora.net/) that sells bracelet and charms separately, and allow users to make their own pattern.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/844aa5e1ce279543c379a27adc56fb6d4f88a4cb.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10fa2bfc99a9b54c44f5b82223e160aed065b2f8.png)

There are 4 types of pandora charms:
- 18 regular charms that give various special effects, such as allow player to walk on lava, or to give player beacon effects. Does not stack when equipping multiple of the same item

- 12 attribute charms that give player small attribute boosts. Stacks when equipping multiple. Some allows multiple same item to be placed into the same holder, and some are not (should be 1 per holder).
- 7 curse charms that impose severe limitation onto player, while give player boosts in other areas. These are the main theme of this mod

- 35 special charms that require player to wear a number of curse charms to activate, but give very good effects when activated

- 4 sword-shaped weapons for fancy magic attack  

When a player joins the game for the first time, this mod will grant the player one pandora necklace with all 7 curses. Player can choose to wear any or all of them for boosts, if they don't mind the limitations. Then player needs to explore loot chests in aim for attribute charms. Some loot chests also have a chance to give special charms with low chance. Unwanted regular/special charms can be smelted into plain charm, and then crafted into regular charms or other special charms. When [L2Hostility](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2hostility) is installed, attribute charms are also craftable.



If players lose their curse charms, they can craft all 7 charms altogether with nether star and some other ingredients.

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71405335ebbd4da0f6fbdb69a9ccec598d98c507.png)
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7256e71003b2c8ae0c505ebb815c9e73c07e54a8.png)
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8273d839fef96681812f523f05fcd61316572c5.png)
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93ec5d7d958088fe80d6964d81a488bcb02b1d09.png)
![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14360165bc242eea02667d23d91430b2f3fcec73.png)

## Checkout our other mods:

[L2Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2backpack): Backpacks, mass item storage, and remote transportation

[L2Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2artifacts): Curios items that gives high attribute boost and special abilities

[ModularGolems](https://modrinth.com/mod/modular-golems): Tinker-like highly customizable golems that are handy in combat and mob farms

[L2Complements](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2-complements): End-game materials, gears, enchantments, and potions

[L2Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2weaponry): A variety of melee weapons, throwable weapons, and shields, each with special abilities

[L2Archery](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2archery): A variety of bows and arrows, each with special abilities

[L2Hostility](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2hostility): Mob enhancement mod that adapts to player strength. Kill mobs to increase difficulty, and reduce difficulty when you die.

[Twilight's Flavors & Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-delight): Farmer's Delight style food with Twilight Forest ingredients. Also adds food in Neapolitan styles.

[Cuisine Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cuisine-delight): Cook your own plate with any combination of ingredients you can think of

[Fruits Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/fruits-delight): Adds 11 types of fruits and 48 food items. All fruits have unique food effects
